title: Test Oban unique jobs with the sandbox's rollback semantics
prompt: Write `test/my_app/unique_job_test.exs` that verifies Oban's `unique` constraint works correctly. The worker `MyApp.Workers.EmailWorker` is declared `use Oban.Worker, queue: :mailers, unique: [period: 60]`. The test must: (1) insert an Oban job with args `%{"email" => "a@example.com"}`, (2) immediately try to insert the SAME args — should return `{:ok, %Job{conflict?: true}}` per Oban's unique semantics, (3) `assert_enqueued` shows only 1 job. Use `testing: :manual` mode (inherits from config).
tier_rationale: Requires knowing Oban unique constraint return shape in sandboxed test context.
